envConfigPath.label: Env Config Path
envConfigPath.help: First-run interactive config JSON path. Plugin reads this file automatically.

rootDir.label: Memory Root Dir
rootDir.help: All memory and timeline data is stored here.

debugLogs.label: Debug Logs
debugLogs.help: Enable verbose runtime logs for troubleshooting.

includeOverviewInInject.label: Inject Memory Overview
includeOverviewInInject.help: Include L1 overview snippets for extracted memories.

includeTimelineOverviewInInject.label: Inject Timeline Overview
includeTimelineOverviewInInject.help: Include L1 overview snippets for timeline chunks.

detailOnRecallTool.label: Recall Tool Loads Details
detailOnRecallTool.help: Whether recall tools load L2 details by default.

detailChars.label: Detail Snippet Chars
detailChars.help: Max L2 characters returned when details are requested.

detailCacheSize.label: Detail Cache Size
detailCacheSize.help: Max L2 files kept in in-memory LRU cache.

semanticCandidateMultiplier.label: Semantic Candidate Multiplier
semanticCandidateMultiplier.help: Multiplier for semantic candidate pool before rerank.

semanticBackfillLimit.label: Semantic Backfill Limit
semanticBackfillLimit.help: How many recent memory/timeline chunks to backfill into vector index on startup.
